What is the tallest animal on Earth?: The giraffe is the tallest animal on Earth.
What is the largest animal on Earth?: The blue whale is the largest animal on Earth.
What is the fastest land animal?: The cheetah is the fastest land animal.

What is the strongest land animal?: The African elephant is considered one of the strongest land animals.
What is the largest bird in the world?: The ostrich is the largest bird in the world.
What is the smallest bird in the world?: The bee hummingbird is the smallest bird in the world.
What is the largest mammal in the world?: The blue whale is the largest mammal in the world.
What is chocolate made from?: Chocolate is made from cacao beans.

What is coffee made from?: Coffee is made from roasted coffee beans.

What is the most popular sport in the wo: Football, also known as soccer, is the most popular sport in the world.
How many players are on a soccer team?: A soccer team has eleven players on the field.
What is the Olympic Games?: The Olympic Games are an international sporting event held every four years.
What is the most spoken language in the: English is the most widely spoken language overall.
What is the most spoken native language: Mandarin Chinese is the most spoken native language in the world.
What is a continent?: A continent is one of Earth's main large landmasses.
What is an island?: An island is a piece of land completely surrounded by water.
What is a peninsula?: A peninsula is a piece of land surrounded by water on most sides.
What is a desert?: A desert is a dry region that receives very little rainfall.
What is a rainforest?: A rainforest is a dense forest characterized by high rainfall.
What is a mountain?: A mountain is a large natural elevation of Earth's surface.
What is a volcano?: A volcano is an opening in Earth's crust through which lava, ash, and gases can escape.
What is an earthquake?: An earthquake is the shaking of Earth's surface caused by movement of tectonic plates.
Why do humans sleep?: Humans sleep to rest the body, process information, and maintain physical and mental health.
Why do we dream?: Scientists believe dreams may help process memories, emotions, and experiences.
What is happiness?: Happiness is a state of well-being and positive emotions.
What is music?: Music is the art of arranging sounds in time to create compositions.
What is a book?: A book is a written or printed work consisting of pages bound together.
What is a movie?: A movie is a series of moving images that tells a story or presents information.
What is an instrument?: A musical instrument is a device created to produce musical sounds.
What is a language?: A language is a system of communication using sounds, symbols, or gestures.
What is communication?: Communication is the exchange of information between individuals or groups.
What is culture?: Culture is the collection of customs, beliefs, arts, and social behavior of a group of people.
What is education?: Education is the process of acquiring knowledge, skills, values, and understanding.
What is a hobby?: A hobby is an activity done regularly for enjoyment during free time.
Who was Alan Turing?: Alan Turing (1912–1954) was a British mathematician, computer scientist, and cryptanalyst, widely considered the father of computing and artificial intelligence.
What color is the sky?: Blue during the day due to light scattering, and black at night
How many countries are there?: There are 195 countries recognized by the United Nations
Why do we sleep?: To allow the brain and body to rest, repair tissues, and consolidate memories

Who was the first man to walk on the moo: Neil Armstrong was the first person to walk on the moon in 1969

What is the Moon?: The Moon is Earth's natural satellite.
What is Mars?: Mars is the fourth planet from the Sun and is known as the Red Planet.
What is Jupiter?: Jupiter is the largest planet in our solar system.
What is Saturn?: Saturn is a gas giant known for its prominent ring system.
What is Earth?: Earth is the third planet from the Sun and the only known planet to support life.

What is democracy?: Democracy is a system of government in which power is held by the people.

What gas do plants absorb from the atmos: Plants absorb carbon dioxide for photosynthesis

What is the main component of glass?: The main component of glass is silica, which comes from sand
Which instrument is used to measure atmo: A barometer is used to measure atmospheric pressure
